name: The Old King's Crown
description: The Old King's Crown is a fae-court area-control card battler — four rival faerie clans vie for the empty throne of a fading kingdom, drafting characters, attaching artifacts, and waging skirmishes over three contested lanes. Each clan's identity (sylvan archers, court schemers, beetle-armored knights, wisp-summoners) plays into a unique strategy. Tight, sharp, lavishly illustrated.
